name: Weihnacht Plaetzchen (Christmas Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar thoroughly.
2. Add well-beaten egg yolks, then extracts.
3. Mix in half the flour, then turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead in until balanced.
4. Roll out and cut into shapes of Christmas trees, stars, and Santa Claus using cutters.
5. Place cookies on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F.
7. Decorate with colored sugar, nuts, and candied cherries.
